response.justification: Candidate has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS, far exceeding the entry-to-mid level requirements. Strong background in clean architecture, TDD, and multi-stack development. Main concerns are overqualification for a junior/mid role, likely salary expectations mismatch, and limited PostgreSQL/Nest.js specific experience (more MongoDB-oriented).
strengths: Deep TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS experience across many years
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture)
Fullstack versatility across web, mobile, embedded, and DevOps
concerns: Significantly overqualified — Staff/Senior level applying for junior/mid role
Primary DB experience is MongoDB, not PostgreSQL as preferred
No explicit Nest.js experience listed; German only basic for on-site German market role
